10.evidenceText: No retail price information found in any of the three sources provided
10.extractionRationale: All three sources (bike24.com, schwalbe.com, and bike-discount.de) contain only product descriptions and features but no explicit pricing information in the provided excerpts

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil - Product Listings
27.evidenceText: Distinct product URLs: p1993546 (40mm schwarz), p1993549 (40mm Kupfer), p1993551 (80mm Kupfer), p1993547 (60mm schwarz). Source p1942018 contains valve cores (accessories), not CoreCap valve listings.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for CoreCap valves. Excluded p1942018 as it is for valve core accessories (Ventilkern), not the CoreCap valve itself. Four distinct product pages with different specifications (size and color variants) were found: p1993546, p1993549, p1993551, p1993547.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Valves - BIKE24
30.evidenceText: Both product listings (BTI-166 and BTI-165) contain only product descriptions and features. No stock status indicators are present in either listing.
30.extractionRationale: Neither of the two product listings provided contains any mention of stock status. The text focuses entirely on product features and descriptions. Since stock status cannot be determined from the available evidence, null is the appropriate return value per instructions.

56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct inner tube model numbers with Clik Valve designation across the sources. Each model number represents a unique SKU/size combination. Excluded conversion kits, valves, and adapters as instructed.

61.evidenceText: Sources show LME Aluminium Alloy Closing Prices (3225.00) and LME Aluminium Premium Duty Paid US Midwest (2520.00), but neither represents the primary LME Aluminium spot price
61.extractionRationale: The provided sources show aluminium alloy and premium products rather than the primary LME Aluminium spot price. Without confirmation that these values are in USD/ton or represent the main contract, and without finding the actual spot price, the value cannot be reliably extracted.
